projects.title: Health-Aware Recipe Modifier
projects.description: Full-stack Flask app that generates recipes tailored to user-specified medical conditions using the Gemini API — flags harmful ingredients, recommends safe substitutes, and generates PDF summary reports.

projects.title: AI Explains Repo
projects.description: Full-stack Next.js app that ingests GitHub repository data and generates AI-powered reports on code quality, architecture, security risks, and performance via the Gemini API, with authenticated session history.

projects.title: Online Python Code Editor
projects.description: Browser-based Python editor built with Flask and CodeMirror that executes user code server-side and streams output back in real time, with syntax highlighting, error handling, and a responsive dark UI.
